title: National Agriculture Day, 2026
summary: Proclamation 11019 of March 24, 2026, declares March 24, 2026, as National Agriculture Day. The proclamation honors farmers, ranchers, and growers for their contributions to feeding families, fueling communities, and sustaining the nation. It highlights investments in soil health, water quality, and supply chain resilience, while also aiming to reduce excessive regulations. The proclamation emphasizes the importance of agriculture to individual and national welfare, quoting President George Washington, and encourages Americans to recognize the vital role of agriculture and express appreciation for those working in the sector.
